results.title: Elon Musk loses case against Sam Altman over OpenAI’s future
results.description: A jury rejected Elon Musk’s claims that OpenAI under Sam Altman’s leadership betrayed its mission to benefit the public by morphing into a for-profit business, finding that he waited too long to sue the company. The verdict reached Monday in...
